name: Claremont Community Center
description: Claremont Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Claremont, NH. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Eastman Community Pickleball
description: Eastman Community Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Grantham, NH. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Eastman Pickleball Courts
description: Eastman Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Springfield, NH. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Eastman Tennis and Pickleball Courts
description: Eastman Tennis and Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Springfield, NH. There are 5 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Newport LaValley Family Community Center
description: Newport LaValley Family Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Newport, NH. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Washington Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Washington Elementary School in Washington, NH! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms.
